class.name: GDKCapture
class.brief_description: Capture metadata and capture-state service accessed via GDK.capture.
class.description:
Manages the PC-supported subset of the GDK XAppCapture system. Access via [code]GDK.capture[/code] after calling [method GDK.initialize].
[b]Capture state[/b]: Use [method enable_capture] and [method disable_capture] to control whether the Game Bar capture pipeline is active for this title.
[b]Capture metadata[/b]: Call [method create_metadata] to obtain a [GDKCaptureMetaData] script-side write context, then use its [code]add_*_event[/code] and [code]start_*_state[/code] methods to annotate clips. PC GDK metadata calls are process-wide/stateless; call [method GDKCaptureMetaData.stop_all_states] before the context is closed to end any active states.
[b]Diagnostic capture[/b]: [method record_diagnostic_clip_async] and [method take_diagnostic_screenshot_async] trigger Game Bar-backed recordings. These require Game Bar to be active on the device and return [GDKResult] errors when unavailable.
[b]PC GDK availability[/b] (all wrapped APIs are in [code]XAppCapture.h[/code] / [code]xgameruntime.lib[/code], [code]_GAMING_DESKTOP[/code]): - [code]XAppCaptureEnableRecord[/code] / [code]XAppCaptureDisableRecord[/code] - [code]XAppCaptureRecordDiagnosticClip[/code] - [code]XAppCaptureTakeDiagnosticScreenshot[/code] - All wrapped [code]XAppCaptureMetadata*[/code] functions
[b]Excluded console-only paths[/b]: - [code]XAppCaptureOpenLocalStorageFiles[/code] / [code]XAppCaptureCloseLocalStorageFilesHandle[/code] - [code]XAppCaptureDiagnosticClipLocalId[/code] result extraction

method.name: enable_capture
method.description: Enable the Game Bar recording and screenshot pipeline for this title. Call this to re-enable capture after a previous [method disable_capture] call. Wraps [code]XAppCaptureEnableRecord[/code]. Returns an error result if the GDK runtime is not initialized.

method.name: disable_capture
method.description: Disable the Game Bar recording and screenshot pipeline for this title. Wraps [code]XAppCaptureDisableRecord[/code]. Returns an error result if the GDK runtime is not initialized.

method.name: record_diagnostic_clip_async
method.description: Asynchronously record a diagnostic video clip of the given [param duration] in seconds. Returns a completion [Signal] that emits a [GDKResult]. Requires Game Bar to be active; returns an error result when Game Bar is unavailable. [param duration] must be greater than zero. Wraps [code]XAppCaptureRecordDiagnosticClip[/code].

method.name: take_diagnostic_screenshot_async
method.description: Asynchronously take a diagnostic screenshot using the given [param path_hint] as a filename hint. Returns a completion [Signal] that emits a [GDKResult]. Requires Game Bar to be active; returns an error result when Game Bar is unavailable. [param path_hint] must not be empty. Wraps [code]XAppCaptureTakeDiagnosticScreenshot[/code].

method.name: create_metadata
method.description: Create a script-side metadata write context. Returns a [GDKCaptureMetaData] wrapper or [code]null[/code] if the runtime is not initialized. [param reserved_bytes] is retained for compatibility and ignored because PC GDK metadata APIs are stateless and do not allocate a native metadata handle.
